goal: Make AOF release value understandable as capability-first product evidence.
risk: AOF continues shipping internal audit surfaces that users cannot translate into value.
loss_boundary: No v9.1 release claim without product value evidence, capability matrix, five-minute demo, and understanding boundary.
acceptance_gates: release-state-audit includes the v9.1 product value gate
evidence_plan: schema, writer, audit, Mission Control projection, tests, release docs, Council review
stop_conditions: Stop if product value evidence cannot explain before/after user capability
Stop if unclear understanding does not escalate
